title: agaloma eriogonoides
intro: Agaloma eriogonoides is a plant species commonly known as the Desert Agaloma or Desert Marigold, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that are beneficial for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agaloma eriogonoides include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves that can be made from the roots and flowers, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
